result.reason: Connections are not correctly restored on startup because the 'connected' status is conflated with 'should reconnect', and only actively connected sessions are persisted at shutdown, leading to lost sessions.
result.approach: Introduce a new 'AutoConnect' property in ConnectionInfo to explicitly track connections intended for restoration. Update XML serialization/deserialization logic in XmlConnectionNodeSerializer28 and XmlConnectionsDeserializer to persist and load this new property. Modify QuickConnectHistoryLoader and QuickConnectHistorySaver to align with this new persistent 'AutoConnect' flag, ensuring correct 'PleaseConnect' state on application startup. Update PreviousSessionOpener to utilize the new 'AutoConnect' property.
